topThreeIssues: Payoff and beat at t=150 claim '900x jump from 0.1% to 4.7%' but actual factor is ~47x; correct the arithmetic
Proportionality tagline repeated 3 times; tighten to two instances
'False-positive rate' introduced as informal label for P(E|not-H) before unpacking; brief gloss on first use
Beat at 225s introduces 'edit distance' without definition for intermediate learners; either define briefly or replace with self-contained second example
Pacing at 225s is rushed: two distinct complexity analyses packed into one 25s beat
Optimal substructure appears third in staircase but is introduced first in narration; reorder staircase to match
Beat at t=130 conflates M-step maximization and convergence inequality; split into two beats
Summary beat at t=218 restates convergence guarantee nearly verbatim from t=155; convert to pure mnemonic ('lift-and-shift')
ASCII 'q parallel p' notation in fullText inconsistent with '||' used elsewhere; standardize
fullText narration describes 'scaled by one-over-p' (inverted dropout convention) mid-explanation before inverted dropout is introduced -- conflates the two variants
Beat at 200s carries two distinct ideas (inverted dropout + closing summary) in single ~40s beat
Top-right region congestion: by t=215 holds goal_label, cov_matrix_def, constraint_label, ranking_label, pc2_note simultaneously without erasure
PC2 mentioned in narration but never drawn orthogonal to PC1 on data cloud; missed visual reinforcement of orthogonality
Lagrange-multiplier beat at t=110 (40s) packs Lagrangian + gradient + eigenvector conclusion in one beat; split for clarity
